title: Refactor code in package imagebuildah
body: The file imagebuildah/build.go is too long to read, we should refactor it

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
bot, test pull request
bot, add author to whitelist

Thanks @WanLinghao 
You need to sign your commit.

git commit -a --amend -s
git push --force
bot, test pull request
@rhatdan Done

LGTM
@giuseppe @nalind @TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL
Changes LGTM, but I really want a head nod from @nalnd on this one.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 03c50f4) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
@WanLinghao Needs a rebase.
@rhatdan  Rebase done
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 2191ba6) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

@WanLinghao another rebase is needed.  We're about to ship a new release today/tomorrow.  I think I'd like to hold this one until after the release so if you want to wait until early next week to rebase that would work.
@TomSweeneyRedHat  Hi, could I continue this now?
@WanLinghao Still needs rebase, then we can merge.  Not sure what you mean "Can I continue this now?"
@WanLinghao yes, please feel free to continue now.  @rhatdan I'd asked @WanLinghao to hold off on the work until after 1.8.4 landed.
@TomSweeneyRedHat @rhatdan  Hi, rebase done, PTAL

Thanks @WanLinghao 
@rh-atomic-bot r+

:pushpin: Commit f1b70f3 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan f1b70f309adf6c544a04a23b2e7c8cb490f7f4b6 -->
:hourglass: Testing commit f1b70f3 with merge d53472d...

LGTM
@WanLinghao TYVM for not only the changes, but for holding them back a bit when requested and the rebase work that resulted.  Very appreciated!
:broken_heart: Test failed - [status-travis](https://travis-ci.org/containers/buildah/builds/550789319?utm_source=github_status&utm_medium=notification)
I've restarted the failing Homu jobs.  They issues don't look at all related to this change.
@TomSweeneyRedHat It seems it's still failed
@WanLinghao can you try repushing your PR?  Sometimes homu goes crazy and the best way to make it happy is to repush.  Sorry!

@jlebon Any chance you could kick this?

@rh-atomic-bot retry
@rh-atomic-bot r+

:pushpin: Commit 7d5b11e has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 7d5b11e5fa9920ebbc1d5cdc49baf8fda668000f -->
:hourglass: Testing commit 7d5b11e with merge 5dc18b8...

Yup, the PAPR tests ran and passed already on the Homu merge commit (hover over the yellow dot). Don't mind the "An internal error occurred." here. That status is for the PR itself, which wasn't retested since the infra flakes.
:broken_heart: Test failed - [status-travis](https://travis-ci.org/containers/buildah/builds/551930792?utm_source=github_status&utm_medium=notification)
What should I do now... I am confused
@WanLinghao I don't know.  I really do not understand what is going on here. Seems that only one test suite in Travis is continuously failing.  I have kicked it off one more time.
@jlebon any thoughts on what we can do to make homu/Red Hat CI happy with this PR?

> @jlebon any thoughts on what we can do to make homu/Red Hat CI happy with this PR?

The comment from `rh-atomic-bot` higher up points to Travis CI being unhappy. The PAPR tests themselves passed (see https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1659#issuecomment-506860764).

To retest on the PR itself to get rid of the "An internal error occurred.", you can comment `bot, retest this please`, but note this is independent from the test Homu does on merge. If you want to retry the merge itself and have Travis rerun, you can do `@rh-atomic-bot retry`.
@jlebon: :key: Insufficient privileges: and not in try users
@rh-atomic-bot retry
:hourglass: Testing commit 7d5b11e with merge 7fc4ca7...

:sunny: Test successful - [status-papr](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/7fc4ca76781f59041e0e3ac5f7035188af7969b3.1562086611604655872/index.html), [status-travis](https://travis-ci.org/containers/buildah/builds/553383186?utm_source=github_status&utm_medium=notification)
Approved by: rhatdan
Pushing 7fc4ca76781f59041e0e3ac5f7035188af7969b3 to master...
WOOT!  Finally merged!  TYVM for the work @WanLinghao  and TYVM @jlebon for the CI help.
